originalTitle: Ask HN: Has anyone replaced Claude/GPT with a local model for daily coding?
content: Has anyone here fully swapped Claude/GPT for a local model as their main coding tool, not just for side experiments? If so, please share your setup and performance (e.g tok/s)
chineseTitle: 问 HN：有人用本地模型替换 Claude/GPT 进行日常编码吗？
chineseContent: 这里是否有人完全将 Claude/GPT 替换为本地模型作为他们的主要编码工具，而不仅仅是为了进行副实验？如果是这样，请分享您的设置和性能（例如 tok/s）
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
